## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updates on hiring process and onboarding for new remote employees](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Around 80 active candidates in the pipeline, with a few strong prospects advancing to interviews](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Need to determine process for providing laptops/equipment to remote hires globally](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Exploring options like equipment rental services (Grover, Hopi) or device management platforms (Rippling)](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Preparing to make first few hires and go through onboarding/offer letter process](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Discussing requirements for an "AI Growth Engineer" role to hire for](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Pipeline Updates

  - [Over 80 people in active candidate pool currently](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [A few strong candidates advanced to interviews with Demetrius and Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Following up with candidates who haven't responded in over a week](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Assessments helping identify stronger candidates, e.g. good results from Pakistan but weaker editing skills](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Providing Laptops/Equipment to Remote Hires

  - [Need process for shipping laptops to global hires and managing devices](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Exploring rental services like Grover, Hopi that can handle shipping, setup, recovery](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Also considering device management platforms like Rippling, Workwise](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Need to research pricing, capabilities, get demos to evaluate options](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### First Hires and Onboarding

  - [Preparing to make first few hires, starting with candidate Pratik](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Need to go through onboarding, offer letters via Remote platform](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Demetrius to work with Molly on first offer letter as an example](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Important to document process thoroughly for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### AI Growth Engineer Role

  - [Discussing hiring for "AI Growth Engineer" type role](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Looking for skills like prompt engineering, automation, research](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Target pay around $5k/month, so looking in regions where that is competitive](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Potential areas: Spain, Italy, Portugal, Greece, parts of UK](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to research laptop/equipment provision options and set up demos](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Molly and Demetrius to work on first offer letter example via Remote](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Continue pipeline management - follow ups, advancing strong candidates](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Determine target regions and approach for AI Growth Engineer role hiring](https://fathom.video/share/-W9aNxndXDt_3suepPosZz4zUhXsSZKC?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
